MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Court orders outstanding sanction for failure to appear at an Order to Show Cause hearing in Dept. 610 vacated. Dismissal on file. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
